perturbation.original_text: Bankers Bank agrees to pay fees equal to $40 per month for all Participating Banks (original or added) for which maintenance is provided.
perturbation.changed_text: Bankers Bank agrees to pay fees equal to $40 per month for all Participating Banks (original or added) for which maintenance is provided, provided however, that if the participating bank is deemed a 'Strategic Partner' then the fee is $60 per month.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a conflict by creating a special case for 'Strategic Partner' banks, increasing their maintenance fee. This contradicts the earlier statement that all Participating Banks pay $40 per month, without defining what constitutes a 'Strategic Partner'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement provides for Continued Service and for Netzee to provide basic maintenance in support following expiration of the initial one (1) year term of the License/Services Schedule. The Continued Service provided by Netzee will be the operation, maintenance, and support of the computer systems, software and interfaces included in the System. Bankers Bank agrees to pay fees equal to $40 per month for all Participating Banks (original or added) for which maintenance is provided, provided however, that if the participating bank is deemed a 'Strategic Partner' then the fee is $60 per month. The maintenance is for a period of one (1) year commencing upon expiration of the initial one (1) year term of the License/Services Schedule. Following the completion of such maintenance term, Bankers Bank may, at its option, renew maintenance for subsequent periods of one (1) year each, subject to adjustments proposed by Netzee not to exceed 5% at least sixty (60) days in advance of the applicable renewal date. Maintenance provided by Netzee during the term of this Agreement shall include (1) standard maintenance upgrades and modifications offered by Netzee to its customers generally, standard maintenance upgrades and modifications offered by Netzee to its customers generally, and for such purpose Netzee will use commercially reasonable efforts to make and include (without limitation) as such modifications changes and upgrades necessary to comply with generally applicable industry and regulatory requirements of which it is notified (2) 5x12 call-in support between hours of 6:30 a.m. and 6:30 p.m. Eastern Time Monday through Friday, (3) in the event of material discrepancies between the Services as provided and the specifications for such Services (which shall be furnished in reasonably acceptable form), reasonable effort (in relation to importance, impact, and scheduled development plans) to correct those discrepancies, and (4) availability of basic Services with at least 99% uptime between 4:00 a.m Monday and 7:00 p.m. Friday and between 8:00 a.m. Saturday and 2:00 p.m. Saturday Eastern Time, exclusive of outages caused by off-peak prescheduled maintenance or causes beyond Netzee's reasonable control (including third-party equipment or communications).
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a new fee structure ($60) for 'Strategic Partner' banks, directly contradicting the initial statement that all Participating Banks pay $40 per month. The contradicted text includes this original statement and is altered by the changed text.

perturbation.original_text: Following the completion of such maintenance term, Bankers Bank may, at its option, renew maintenance for subsequent periods of one (1) year each, subject to adjustments proposed by Netzee not to exceed 5% at least sixty (60) days in advance of the applicable renewal date.
perturbation.changed_text: Following the completion of such maintenance term, Bankers Bank may, at its option, renew maintenance for subsequent periods of one (1) year each. Netzee must notify Bankers Bank of any price adjustments within 30 days of the renewal date. Adjustments proposed by Netzee shall not exceed 5% at least sixty (60) days in advance of the applicable renewal date.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text presents conflicting statements regarding when Netzee should notify Bankers Bank about price adjustments. It first says Netzee must notify Bankers Bank of any price adjustments within 30 days of the renewal date. Then it states that adjustments proposed by Netzee shall not exceed 5% at least sixty (60) days in advance of the applicable renewal date. This introduces uncertainty and creates an in-text contradiction, as it is unclear whether the price adjustments must be notified 30 days before or 60 days before.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement provides for Continued Service and for Netzee to provide basic maintenance in support following expiration of the initial one (1) year term of the License/Services Schedule. The Continued Service provided by Netzee will be the operation, maintenance, and support of the computer systems, software and interfaces included in the System. Bankers Bank agrees to pay fees equal to $40 per month for all Participating Banks (original or added) for which maintenance is provided, provided however, that if the participating bank is deemed a 'Strategic Partner' then the fee is $60 per month. The maintenance is for a period of one (1) year commencing upon expiration of the initial one (1) year term of the License/Services Schedule. Following the completion of such maintenance term, Bankers Bank may, at its option, renew maintenance for subsequent periods of one (1) year each. Netzee must notify Bankers Bank of any price adjustments within 30 days of the renewal date. Adjustments proposed by Netzee shall not exceed 5% at least sixty (60) days in advance of the applicable renewal date. Maintenance provided by Netzee during the term of this Agreement shall include (1) standard maintenance upgrades and modifications offered by Netzee to its customers generally, standard maintenance upgrades and modifications offered by Netzee to its customers generally, and for such purpose Netzee will use commercially reasonable efforts to make and include (without limitation) as such modifications changes and upgrades necessary to comply with generally applicable industry and regulatory requirements of which it is notified (2) 5x12 call-in support between hours of 6:30 a.m. and 6:30 p.m. Eastern Time Monday through Friday, (3) in the event of material discrepancies between the Services as provided and the specifications for such Services (which shall be furnished in reasonably acceptable form), reasonable effort (in relation to importance, impact, and scheduled development plans) to correct those discrepancies, and (4) availability of basic Services with at least 99% uptime between 4:00 a.m Monday and 7:00 p.m. Friday and between 8:00 a.m. Saturday and 2:00 p.m. Saturday Eastern Time, exclusive of outages caused by off-peak prescheduled maintenance or causes beyond Netzee's reasonable control (including third-party equipment or communications).
perturbation.justification: The changed text creates an in-text contradiction. The original text stated that adjustments proposed by Netzee shall not exceed 5% at least sixty (60) days in advance of the applicable renewal date. The changed text adds the contradictory statement that "Netzee must notify Bankers Bank of any price adjustments within 30 days of the renewal date." This directly conflicts with the sixty (60) day notice period, creating uncertainty and a direct inconsistency regarding when the notification of price adjustments should occur. This is highlighted in the perturbation explanation and present in the contradicted text.
